libraryStrings.noScenesDescription: Spustelėkite žemiau esantį mygtuką „Nauja scena“, kad pridėtumėte pirmąją sceną
libraryStrings.changeSceneBody: Changing the scene type will cause all interactions to be repositioned randomly. Are you sure you wish to proceed?
libraryStrings.createASceneToGoTo: Create a new scene to go to
libraryStrings.createSceneError: Please create a new scene to proceed
libraryStrings.pickAnExistingScene: Pick an existing scene to go to
libraryStrings.setCameraStartTooltip: Set current camera angle as a starting point for this scene
libraryStrings.deleteInteractionText: Ar tikrai norite ištrinti šią sąveiką?
libraryStrings.deleteSceneText: Ar tikrai norite ištrinti šią sceną?
libraryStrings.deleteSceneTextWithObjects: Deleting this scene will also delete all interactions within the scene and any navigational hotspots pointing to this scene. Are you sure you wish to delete this scene?
libraryStrings.cloneSceneText: Are you sure you wish to clone this scene?
libraryStrings.cloneSceneTextWithObjects: Cloning this scene will also clone all interactions within the scene. Are you sure you wish to clone this scene?
libraryStrings.actionButtonTemplate: @title. Click to highlight, double-click or enter key to edit
libraryStrings.dragCancelTemplate: Dragging was cancelled. @title returned to its original position.
libraryStrings.draggableInstructions: To reorder items, drag with mouse or press Space or Enter to pick up a draggable item. While dragging, use the arrow keys to move the item. Press Space or Enter to drop the item in its new position, or press Escape to cancel.
